summary: Full stack testing of AFI app. All 17 backend tests pass. All frontend flows tested and working: landing page, auth (signup/login/toggle/error), dashboard (10 signals, filter tabs, watchlist add/remove/FILTER ACTIVE badge, invalid ticker validation), pricing page (3 tiers), protected routes, logout.

issues: Logout button uses text 'Sign out' (no data-testid='sidebar-logout'), found via text selector - minor

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard fetchData uses useCallback with empty deps [] but references authHeaders() — this is fine since authHeaders is stable but could cause stale closure if token changes mid-session (low priority)
/api/signals endpoint does not require auth — signals are public (by design based on code), which is acceptable for Phase 1
MOCKED: /api/signals returns hardcoded SEED_SIGNALS list, no live EDGAR data
seed_data_creation: Created test user TEST_<uuid>@afi.com during signup test (auto-created via API)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified working. test@afi.com/test123 is the main test user. Signals are MOCKED (hardcoded). Watchlist state persists in MongoDB per user. After testing, watchlist for test@afi.com was left empty.
